name: Excel 处理
description: 读取和写入 Excel 文件
script:
# Excel 处理示例
import pandas as pd
import io
import base64

operation = inputs.get('operation', 'read')

try:
    if operation == 'read':
        # 从 base64 读取 Excel
        excel_data = inputs.get('excel_data', '')
        sheet_name = inputs.get('sheet', 0)
        
        if excel_data.startswith('data:'):
            excel_data = excel_data.split(',')[1]
        
        excel_bytes = base64.b64decode(excel_data)
        df = pd.read_excel(io.BytesIO(excel_bytes), sheet_name=sheet_name)
        
        outputs['row_count'] = len(df)
        outputs['column_count'] = len(df.columns)
        outputs['columns'] = list(df.columns)
        outputs['data'] = df.head(10).to_dict('records')
        outputs['success'] = True
    
    elif operation == 'write':
        # 从数据创建 Excel
        data = inputs.get('data', [])
        sheet_name = inputs.get('sheet', 'Sheet1')
        
        df = pd.DataFrame(data)
        
        # 写入 Excel
        buffer = io.BytesIO()
        with pd.ExcelWriter(buffer, engine='openpyxl') as writer:
            df.to_excel(writer, sheet_name=sheet_name, index=False)
        
        buffer.seek(0)
        excel_base64 = base64.b64encode(buffer.getvalue()).decode()
        outputs['excel_data'] = f'data:application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet;base64,{excel_base64}'
        outputs['row_count'] = len(df)
        outputs['success'] = True
    
    elif operation == 'merge':
        # 合并多个 Excel
        excel_files = inputs.get('files', [])
        dfs = []
        
        for file_data in excel_files:
            if file_data.startswith('data:'):
                file_data = file_data.split(',')[1]
            excel_bytes = base64.b64decode(file_data)
            df = pd.read_excel(io.BytesIO(excel_bytes))
            dfs.append(df)
        
        merged_df = pd.concat(dfs, ignore_index=True)
        
        buffer = io.BytesIO()
        with pd.ExcelWriter(buffer, engine='openpyxl') as writer:
            merged_df.to_excel(writer, sheet_name='Merged', index=False)
        
        buffer.seek(0)
        excel_base64 = base64.b64encode(buffer.getvalue()).decode()
        outputs['excel_data'] = f'data:application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet;base64,{excel_base64}'
        outputs['total_rows'] = len(merged_df)
        outputs['success'] = True
    
except Exception as e:
    outputs['error'] = str(e)
